# Change Management Plan Template

## Document Information
| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Project Name | [Enter project name] |
| Document Version | 1.0 |
| Date | [YYYY-MM-DD] |
| Prepared By | [Project Manager/Change Manager] |
| Approved By | [Sponsor name] |
| Next Review Date | [YYYY-MM-DD] |

## Executive Summary
### Purpose
Describe the purpose of this change management plan and its relationship to the overall project.

### Scope of Change
Describe the organizational units, processes, systems, and roles impacted.

### Change Management Approach
Summarize the methodology, principles, and overall approach.

---

## 3. Change Management Strategy

2. [Objective 2 - e.g., Minimize productivity loss during transition]
3. [Objective 3 - e.g., Ensure sustainable change through training and support]

- [Principle 1 - e.g., Transparent communication throughout the process]

| Stakeholder Update | All Stakeholders | Monthly | High-level progress, success stories |  |

## 11. Governance and Decision Making
### 11.1 Change Control Board
| Role | Name | Responsibilities |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Chair |  | Overall change approval and direction |
| Sponsor |  | Business case and resource approval |
| Project Manager |  | Implementation coordination |
| Change Manager |  | Change strategy and execution |
| Business Representative |  | User perspective and requirements |

### 11.2 Decision Framework
| Decision Type | Decision Maker | Escalation Path | Timeline |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Change approach modifications | Change Manager | Project Manager | 2 days |
| Resource allocation changes | Project Manager | Project Sponsor | 5 days |
| Scope changes | Project Sponsor | Steering Committee | 10 days |

---

## 12. Lessons Learned and Continuous Improvement
### 12.1 Lessons Learned Process
1. Collection: Regular feedback sessions and retrospectives.
2. Analysis: Identify patterns and root causes.
3. Documentation: Capture lessons in the knowledge base.
4. Application: Implement improvements in subsequent phases.
5. Sharing: Communicate lessons to other projects.

### 12.2 Continuous Improvement Approach
- Monthly review of change metrics and stakeholder feedback.
- Quarterly assessment of change management effectiveness.
- Adjustment of strategies based on lessons learned.
- Integration of industry and organizational best practices.

---

## Instructions for Use
1. Replace all bracketed placeholders with project-specific information.
2. Customize sections based on complexity and scope.
3. Remove sections that are not applicable.
4. Ensure alignment with the project management plan.
5. Review and update throughout the lifecycle.
6. Use this template alongside change request and impact assessment tools.
